## Documentation Issue

A clear and concise description of what documentation needs to be improved or added.

## Current State

Describe the current state of the documentation. What's missing or unclear?

## Proposed Changes

What specific changes would you like to see in the documentation?

## Location

Where should this documentation be added or updated?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md
- [ ] API.md
- [ ] DEPLOYMENT.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the documentation issue.

## Related Issues

- Related to #[issue number]
